mapper.select: SELECT P.ID AS ID_PRODUCT, P.NAME AS NAME, P.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, P.PRICE AS PRICE, P.STOCK_QUANTITY AS STOCK_QUANTITY, P.IS_ACTIVE AS ACTIVE, C.ID AS ID_CATEGORY, C.NAME AS CATEGORY_NAME, C.DESCRIPTION AS CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION, S.ID AS ID_SUPPLIER, S.NAME AS SUPPLIER_NAME, S.CONTACT AS SUPPLIER_CONTACT, S.PHONE_NUMBER AS SUPPLIER_PHONE, S.ADDRESS AS SUPPLIER_ADDRESS FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.ID = P.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER_PRODUCT SP ON SP.ID_PRODUCT = P.ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.ID = SP.ID_SUPPLIER WHERE P.IS_ACTIVE = TRUE ORDER BY P.ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT (NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE, STOCK_QUANTITY, CATEGORY_ID, IS_ACTIVE) VALUES (#{product.name}, #{product.description}, #{product.price}, #{product.stockQuantity}, #{product.categoryId}, #{product.isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT P.ID AS ID_PRODUCT, P.NAME AS NAME, P.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, P.PRICE AS PRICE, P.STOCK_QUANTITY AS STOCK_QUANTITY, P.IS_ACTIVE AS ACTIVE, C.ID AS ID_CATEGORY, C.NAME AS CATEGORY_NAME, C.DESCRIPTION AS CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION, S.ID AS ID_SUPPLIER, S.NAME AS SUPPLIER_NAME, S.CONTACT AS SUPPLIER_CONTACT, S.PHONE_NUMBER AS SUPPLIER_PHONE, S.ADDRESS AS SUPPLIER_ADDRESS FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.ID = P.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER_PRODUCT SP ON SP.ID_PRODUCT = P.ID LEFT JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.ID = SP.ID_SUPPLIER WHERE P.ID = #{id} AND P.IS_ACTIVE = TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET NAME = #{product.name}, DESCRIPTION = #{product.description}, PRICE = #{product.price}, STOCK_QUANTITY = #{product.stockQuantity}, CATEGORY_ID = #{product.categoryId}, IS_ACTIVE = #{product.isActive} WHERE ID = #{id}
